required_before_new_render: new topic voiceover_units with stable voice_id values
new per-topic asset_generation_plan generated from the script
topic-specific images generated or sourced for every scene
scene data using only cognitiveDocumentary scene types
local or licensed full-bleed B-roll/image assets
render_ready_when: all subtitles map to voice_id and visual_section_id
composition duration covers final audio plus 2-3 seconds tail
all staticFile assets exist under video-app/public
scene visual.asset paths point to generated or licensed assets, not only local fallback placeholders
preview render is visually nonblank and subtitles do not collide with chapter text
